title: Apollo Global Management: Earnings Picture Improving, Technicals Show Signs Of Life

title: 7 Hot Stocks to Book Profits In Before 2023
text: Although a new year tends to bring feelings of optimism, when it comes to the current market dynamics, it's time to consider hot stocks to book profits in before 2023 arrives. At first, circumstances appeared favorable, with CNN reporting on Dec. 13 that inflation cooled more than expected.

title: Carvana shares tank as bankruptcy concerns grow for used car retailer
text: Shares of Carvana plummeted by nearly 40% after its largest creditors reportedly signed a deal binding them to act together in negotiations.

title: Shutterfly Finds Americans Concerned about Their Holiday Gift Budget and Choosing Meaningful Gifts
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Today, Shutterfly, the leading e-commerce brand for personalized products and custom designs, announced findings from their annual holiday survey, as well as proprietary data on consumer retail trends and the company's approach to the holiday season amidst continued inflation.
